name: LG EXAONE 4.0 32B (Non-reasoning)
archDisplay: Dense hybrid-attention transformer, 64 layers, local:global attention 3:1, GQA (40Q/8KV), QK-Reorder-Norm; single checkpoint with toggleable non-reasoning/reasoning modes
note: Default (non-reasoning) mode of Korea's first open-weight hybrid model; faster, lower scores on math/coding than reasoning mode.

results.notes: BFCL-v3 tool/function-calling score, non-reasoning mode. Confirmed identically on both the arXiv paper (html v1) and the HuggingFace model card table.

Tau-Bench Retail domain, non-reasoning mode (Airline domain separately scored 25.5; only the Retail split is added since the taxonomy has a single tau-bench slug, matching this repo's convention of one score per benchmarkSlug per model).
MMMLU (Multilingual MMLU) Spanish-language split, non-reasoning mode.

verificationNotes: Existence, release date (2025-07-15, 'Korea's first open-weight hybrid AI model'), 131K context, license v1.2 NC, trilingual EN/KO/ES, and function-calling/tool-use/agentic support confirmed on HF model card and PR Newswire release. Fetched full text (arxiv.org/html/2507.11407) and confirmed all 6 non-reasoning-mode rows (Table 4) match exactly: MMLU-Redux 89.8, MMLU-Pro 77.6, GPQA-Diamond 63.7, AIME2025 35.9, LiveCodeBench v5 43.3, IFEval 84.8 — no changes.
